message:
feat: add swarm mode for safe multi-user todo queue access (#117)

Implements issue #115 — Swarm Mode lets external collaborators submit
todo items via a public invite link with strict safety validation,
while keeping terminal/PTY access owner-only.

Architecture:
- Separate /swarm/api/* router with swarm key auth (timing-safe)
- Separate swarm.html Vite entry point with minimal React app
- Command blocklist validated server-side before items reach todo store
- In-memory per-key rate limiting (10 req/min sliding window)
- Tunnel via cloudflared (preferred) or localtunnel (fallback)
- Owner management UI via globe icon popover in toolbar

New files:
- server/src/swarm-keys.ts — key generation, storage, validation
- server/src/swarm-blocklist.ts — command blocklist matching
- server/src/swarm-rate-limiter.ts — per-key rate limiting
- server/src/swarm-tunnel.ts — tunnel lifecycle management
- server/src/swarm-router.ts — Express router for swarm endpoints
- web/src/SwarmApp.tsx — simplified swarm queue UI
- web/swarm.html + swarm-main.tsx — second Vite entry point
- web/src/components/SwarmPopover.tsx — owner swarm management
- web/src/hooks/useSwarmStatus.ts — swarm status polling hook

Modified files:
- server/src/auth.ts — added swarmAuthMiddleware
- server/src/index.ts — owner mgmt routes, static serving, mount swarm router
- web/vite.config.ts — multi-page rollup config
- web/src/components/TerminalView.tsx — swarm status indicator

Closes #115

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
